msk.cluster.firehose.CfnAbout: Details of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that is the destination for broker logs.

msk.cluster.firehose.DeliveryStream.Description: The Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that is the destination for broker logs.

msk.cluster.firehose.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether broker logs get sent to the specified Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.
